tagline: Make Your Dream Pool a Reality

hero.headline:
Your Backyard Paradise Built by
One Team
hero.subheadline: No subcontractors, no runaround. Derby City Pools designs, builds, and maintains your custom pool and outdoor living space with one dedicated in-house crew from first sketch to final swim. Louisville trusts us to deliver on time, on budget, every time.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Custom Pools & Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From fiberglass and gunite pools to outdoor kitchens and full landscape design, our in-house team handles every detail so your dream backyard becomes reality.

cards.title: Fiberglass Swimming Pools
cards.description: Choose from dozens of models and colors, from cocktail pools to full-size family designs. Factory-built durability with a smooth, low-maintenance finish installed in as little as 11 working days.

cards.title: Gunite & Custom Pools
cards.description: Fully custom gunite and liner pools built to your exact vision. Unique shapes, vanishing edges, beach entries, and tanning ledges crafted with the finest materials and expert hands.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Breathe new life into an aging pool with updated equipment, plumbing, deck areas, splash pads, and modern layouts that make your backyard feel brand new again.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Resort-style outdoor kitchens, fire features, sound systems, and complete landscape design that turn your backyard into the destination your family never wants to leave.

cards.title: Hardscapes & Structures
cards.description: Paver patios, retaining walls, pool houses, pavilions, pergolas, and louvered shade structures that complement your pool area and extend your living space outdoors.

cards.title: Spas, Hot Tubs & Service
cards.description: Spa and swim spa installation with integrated waterfalls and water features, plus ongoing equipment maintenance, covers, heaters, and salt systems to keep everything running perfectly.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Schedule a free on-site consultation. We listen to your ideas, assess your yard, and work with you to design a pool and outdoor space that fits your lifestyle and budget.

steps.title: We Build It Right
steps.description: Our full in-house team handles every phase: permitting, excavation, plumbing, electrical, pool installation, hardscaping, and landscaping. One crew, one point of contact, zero subcontractor confusion.

steps.title: Dive In and Enjoy
steps.description: Your custom pool and outdoor living space are delivered on time and on budget. We stick around for equipment training, maintenance, and warranty support so you enjoy worry-free ownership for years.

about.label: Why Louisville Trusts Derby City Pools
about.headline: One In-House Team From Design to Dive-In
about.description: Since 2014, Derby City Pools & Outdoor Living has been transforming Louisville backyards into personal retreats. With nearly 25 years of combined landscaping and outdoor living expertise, our team handles every aspect of your project in-house, from initial design and city permitting through construction, finishing, and ongoing maintenance. No subcontractors, no finger-pointing, no delays. Just a dedicated crew that treats your backyard like their own.

features.title: Full In-House Construction
features.description: Every trade, from excavation to electrical to landscaping, is handled by our own crew. One team, one standard of quality, one point of accountability.

features.title: Any Pool Type You Want
features.description: Fiberglass, gunite, liner, plunge pools, swim spas. We are not locked into one product. We match the right pool type to your yard, lifestyle, and budget.

features.title: On Time. On Budget. Guaranteed.
features.description: Transparent communication throughout your project with no surprise costs. We set expectations clearly and deliver on every promise we make.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Costs.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, itemized quote before we break ground. We work with your budget to build the backyard you have been dreaming about.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool and project we build. If anything falls short of the standard we promised, we make it right at no additional cost. Our licensed, insured team delivers the same craftsmanship we would demand for our own families. That is the Derby City difference, and our 4.6-star reputation proves it.

faqs.question: How long does a pool installation take?
faqs.answer: Fiberglass pools can be installed in as little as 11 working days. Gunite and custom pools typically take 8 to 12 weeks depending on complexity. We provide a detailed timeline during your consultation and keep you updated at every stage.

faqs.question: What types of pools do you install?
faqs.answer: We install fiberglass, gunite (concrete), and liner pools in every size and configuration, from small cocktail pools and plunge pools to full resort-style designs with vanishing edges, beach entries, tanning ledges, and water features.

faqs.question: Do you handle permitting and inspections?
faqs.answer: Yes. As a licensed Kentucky contractor, we manage all permits, inspections, and code compliance for your project. You never have to deal with city offices or paperwork.

faqs.question: Can you renovate my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We do complete pool renovations including new equipment, plumbing, updated deck areas, layout changes, and splash pad additions. We can modernize any aging pool to look and perform like new.

faqs.question: Do you only build pools or do you handle the entire backyard?
faqs.answer: We are a full-service outdoor living company. Beyond pools, we design and build outdoor kitchens, fire features, patios, pergolas, pool houses, landscape lighting, and complete landscape design. One team handles everything.

testimonials.name: John R.
testimonials.text: Derby City Pools was great to work with from start to finish! They had our pool and hot tub done in 11 working days. The entire team was professional and the quality exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: John C.
testimonials.text: They did a complete renovation with all new equipment, plumbing, deck area and updated pool layout with a Splash Pad area. Their communication, transparency, expertise and professionalism were unmatched.

testimonials.name: Rob A.
testimonials.text: I left a glowing review after their pool and landscaping install 4 years ago. Their service is just as impressive. I recently had troubles with my heater and Alex made multiple trips to resolve the issue. Loyal customer for life.

Ready to Build Your
Dream Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a free on-site design consultation. We will listen to your vision, assess your space, and provide an honest, detailed quote with zero pressure and zero obligation.
